title: Better Cool Mace
description: A Better Cool Mace Is Waiting You You will intersted this pack if u a Mace PVPER
body:
Xurion’s Pack is a carefully designed Minecraft resource pack that enhances the game’s visuals while keeping the original Minecraft style.
The goal of this pack is to improve clarity, consistency, and overall aesthetics

Features:
• Better Cool Mace Improves Your Play In Mace PVP Because It's Smooth and Cool


Why use Better Cool Mace Pack? If you enjoy Minecraft’s Mace PVP look but want a more polished and modern style, this pack is perfect for you.
It improves visibility and helps enhance your performance in PvP and Survival.

Compatibility: • Minecraft Java Edition
• Versions: 1.21 – 1.21.11

Installation: Download the pack and place it in your Resource Packs folder.

Hope you enjoy the pack! ❤️
